name: Eliott Montagne
description:
House-sitting in a French castle when this guy tries to break in.

You get him captured, but the snow storm trapped you together in the castle until it passes. He's trying to charm his way out of the ropes (and his frozen clothes).

house sitter!user

x

theif!char

AnyPOV

(Using macros)

Unestablished Relationship

tw: he himself should have none. Jean is a black flag but shouldn't be in the roleplay unless you hint that he shows up.

I wanted to do a little dark romance series, and even though Cold Feet isn't dark, I added a few things to lean it that way.

A few key points to help with your play:

➴ You are somehow at this castle while the owners are away. Play it as the heir of whoever owns the castle or simply as a house-sitter. I played it as a person from the US who takes jobs to travel.

➴ Eliott is a certified good b0y. He should be charming but never vi0lent toward you. Jean, one of his co-criminals on this job, is the one you should be wary of. Add him in to your play for more drama/danger.

➴ There's a snowstorm happening and the roads are completely blocked. Calling the police will not get you far.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞

Do not leave the following reviews:

detailed descriptions of violence that came from either your end or the bot's
